title: Where to Purchase EigenCloud (prev. EigenLayer) (EIGEN): Full Guide
content:
EigenCloud (EIGEN) provides infrastructure for verifiable apps and AI, serving as a critical piece of the modern [Ethereum](/ethereum)-focused stack. As the network continues to build, market participants often look for ways to interact with the ecosystem. Before deciding on any action, note that our internal analysis assigns the token a Risk Score of 6, indicating a medium-risk classification. | Metric | Details | |

## Why Buy EigenCloud? Investors often consider EIGEN for its role as a utility token within the protocol, used for governance and securing network services. Its narrative strength of 95 makes it a topic of interest for those tracking infrastructure development, similar to Chainlink or Internet Computer.

## Top Exchange Options For those seeking exposure, EIGEN is typically available on major centralized exchanges that support ERC-20 tokens. Ensure that the exchange is reputable and supports the specific liquidity requirements for the asset.

## Purchase Tutorial 1. Choose a regulated exchange: Verify the platform supports EIGEN. 2. Deposit fiat or stablecoins: Use bank transfers or credit cards to fund your account. 3. Execute the trade: Navigate to the EIGEN/USD or EIGEN/USDT pair and enter your desired quantity. 4. Transfer to self-custody: Once purchased, move your tokens to a private wallet to retain control.

## Securing Your Tokens For long-term holdings, hardware wallets are recommended. These devices store your private keys offline, protecting your assets from the risks inherent in keeping funds on centralized exchanges. Always backup your recovery phrase in a secure, physical location.
